content:
You can now create multi-select fields in Projects and Issue fields so a single field can hold more than one value. Tag an item with everything it relates to (e.g., multiple teams, modules, or categories) instead of picking just one.

Issue Fields

Projects Fields

To try it, create or edit a field and choose the multi-select type. You can set multiple values from the sidebar, and then filter by them in your project views.

Share your feedback in the GitHub Community.

The post Multi-select fields for Projects and Issues in public preview appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
